title: Flavorful Canadian Russet Potato Tagine
description: A garlicky and light Canadian dish featuring russet potato, perfect for a weeknight dinner, made in a ceramic tagine and air fryer, following satvik-friendly guidelines
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, toss the cubed potatoes with olive oil, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated
Load the potatoes into the air fryer basket and cook for 15 minutes, shaking halfway through
While the potatoes are cooking, mix the chopped parsley and lemon juice in a small bowl
After the potatoes have finished cooking, transfer them to the ceramic tagine
Pour the parsley and lemon juice mixture over the potatoes and toss to combine
Return the tagine to the air fryer and cook for an additional 5 minutes
Remove the tagine from the air fryer and serve the potatoes hot
